name: Mississippi College Employees
description_short: Marathon County Employees Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving employees and their families in Wisconsin, offering competitive loans, savings accounts, and comprehensive banking services.
description_long:
Marathon County Employees Credit Union (MCECU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union headquartered in Wausau, Wisconsin. Like all credit unions, it operates under NCUA insurance and is governed by its members rather than external shareholders, allowing it to prioritize member benefits over profit maximization. The organization has been serving the Marathon County community and surrounding areas, with recent expansion efforts including a Lake View Branch location.

MCECU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products designed for personal and small business banking needs. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (new and used vehicles), recreational vehicle financing, mortgage loans of all types, home equity loans, debt consolidation loans, lines of credit, and signature loans, with advertised rates as low as 3.74% APR. Their savings products include regular savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit, health savings accounts, individual retirement accounts (including Roth and SEP options), and specialty accounts like Christmas Club and Funeral Trusts. They also issue Visa credit cards and offer fee-free checking accounts across multiple tiers (regular, 55+, student, and small business).

What distinguishes MCECU is its emphasis on member convenience and financial counseling. They offer free financial planning services through on-site financial counselors, remote deposit capture (RDC) functionality for mobile check deposits, a 24-hour telephone teller system, surcharge-free ATM access through shared branching networks, mobile banking apps, and online bill pay. Additional services include foreign currency exchange without airport or bank markup fees, notary services at no charge, and tools like their "MARS" Member Audio Response System for account management. Their Lake View Branch operates with limited hours (Tuesdays and Thursdays, 11am-3pm), suggesting they serve a specific membership base.

As a credit union, MCECU provides solid value for qualified members through competitive rates and member-focused services. However, potential members should confirm eligibility requirements, as credit unions typically restrict membership to specific employment groups, family members, or community affiliations. The limited branch hours at their Lake View location and the emphasis on remote/digital banking suggest they prioritize technology-enabled access over extensive physical infrastructure. Members should verify membership eligibility based on Marathon County employment connections before applying.
services: Mortgage loans of all types (purchase, refinance)
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Recreational vehicle and motor home financing
Fee-free checking accounts (regular, 55+, student, small business)
Certificates of deposit and money market accounts
Individual retirement accounts (Roth, SEP, regular, Conversion Roth)
Remote deposit capture (RDC) via mobile app
Online bill pay and automatic payment setup
24-hour telephone teller and MARS audio response system
pros: Advertised loan rates as low as 3.74% APR, competitive for credit unions
Free financial counseling services provided by on-site financial counselors
Remote deposit capture (RDC) allows check deposits via mobile app with same-business-day processing
Surcharge-free ATM access through nationwide shared branching network
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, auto loans, retirement accounts, and fee-free checking options
Foreign currency exchange without inflated airport, hotel, or bank fees
Free notary services and multiple convenience features (24-hour telephone teller, online bill pay, mobile banking)
cons: Membership eligibility appears restricted to Marathon County employees and affiliates; not open to general public
Limited physical branch hours (Lake View Branch only open Tuesdays and Thursdays, 11am-3pm)
Website does not clearly disclose membership eligibility requirements or how to qualify
No mention of deposit insurance limits, fee structures, or dividend rate ranges on main pages
Reliance on mobile and remote banking services suggests minimal in-person service availability
best_for: Marathon County employees and their immediate family members seeking competitive loan rates
Members who are comfortable with mobile and online banking and don't require frequent in-person branch visits
Individuals looking for fee-free checking and comprehensive financial planning guidance
Borrowers seeking mortgage, auto, or debt consolidation loans with credit union member rates
diagnosis: Marathon County Employees Credit Union is best for employees of Marathon County and their families who want competitive loan rates, fee-free checking, and comprehensive financial services with free financial counseling. The main caveat is confirming membership eligibility upfront, as credit unions restrict membership to specific employment groups, and being prepared for limited physical branch hours with an emphasis on digital/remote banking access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Mississippi College Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in Clinton, MS. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
